nl_query: How many moderation applications adjusted marks by exactly 3?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM   moderation_application ma
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ma.script_id
WHERE  em.adjusted_total - em.original_total = 3
